hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$file" in *requirements.txt|*pyproject.toml) echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  Dependency file edited — run uv lock to keep uv.lock in sync.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A dependency file was just edited (requirements.txt or pyproject.toml). Before considering the task complete, run uv lock (or uv lock --upgrade-package <name> for a targeted upgrade) so uv.lock stays in sync. Otherwise local installs will silently use the OLD versions and HF Spaces (which installs from requirements.txt directly) will diverge from local tests."}}' ;; esac; exit 0
